description_long: This is a modern, two-story rectangular house surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge fence, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist white facade. The property includes a backyard with a circular swimming pool, sun loungers, a large patio umbrella, and a shaded outdoor dining area. A mature tree provides shade to part of the yard, and the garden is well-maintained with a mix of paved and grassy areas. The house has multiple symmetrically arranged windows on each side, and the main entrance is marked by a simple door with two potted plants. The rooftop appears accessible, with an open terrace and visible stair access. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, surrounded by a hedge fence, featuring a backyard pool, patio, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with a circular pool, sun loungers, a large umbrella, and a tree, with the house's rear facade and hedge fence visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the main entrance with two potted plants, the hedge gate, and the outdoor dining area to the right, as well as the pool and tree to the left.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the house with a barbecue grill, a round dining table, and a clear view of the rooftop terrace and interior furnishings.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the opposite side of the house, showing the pool, tree, and patio area, with the hedge fence enclosing the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with two potted plants, no porch or overhang, minimalistic and functional
